## Multi-Fuel Capability
- Pipeline natural gas: ALL models
- Wellhead/field gas: ALL (with derating + treatment)
- Flare gas: G3520, CG260 (designed for it)
- Biogas/landfill: CG series designed for it
- Hydrogen blend: Up to 25% H2 (some models)

## Output: AC Only — Needs Rectification for 800V DC
- All units output 3-phase AC (480V, 4,160V, 11kV, or 13.8kV)
- Path: Genset (AC) -> Rectifier (Eaton/ABB/Schneider) -> 800V DC bus
- Total path efficiency: ~40% fuel-to-DC-bus

## N+1 Configurations for ADC Sites

### Trappeys (1.3 MW IT): 3x G3516J (1.6 MW each) = 4.8 MW installed
### MARLIE 1 (1 MW IT): 2x G3512H (1.03 MW each) = 2.06 MW installed
### Willow Glen 10 MW: 5x G3520J (2.5 MW each) = 12.5 MW installed
### Willow Glen 100 MW: 3x G3616A4 (8.7 MW each) per 20 MW block

## Recommendation: Standardize on G3516J (1.6 MW)
- Modular enough for any site
- Large enough to be cost-effective
- Nscale deal proves G3500 series at scale
- Parts commonality across fleet

## Lead Times (2026): 6-15 months — ORDER EARLY

## Louisiana Dealer
- Louisiana Cat — www.louisianacat.com
- Power Systems Division
- Covers all Louisiana including Lafayette, New Iberia, Baton Rouge

## Nscale Deal Reference
- 2 GW at Monarch campus using G3500 series (likely G3516J/G3520J mix)
- ~800-1,250 units total
- One of largest gas genset orders in Cat history
